recommendedPolicies.name: General Liability
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers third-party bodily injury and property damage claims. Essential for any business with customer foot traffic.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: A customer slip-and-fall or foodborne illness claim could result in a lawsuit exceeding $100,000.

recommendedPolicies.name: Commercial Property
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers damage to your business property, equipment, inventory, and leasehold improvements.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Replacing commercial kitchen equipment alone can cost $50,000-$150,000.

recommendedPolicies.name: Business Owner's Policy (BOP)
recommendedPolicies.description: Bundles general liability and commercial property at a discount. Often the most cost-effective option for small businesses.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Saves 15-30% compared to purchasing general liability and commercial property separately.

recommendedPolicies.name: Workers' Compensation
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers employee medical costs and lost wages from work-related injuries. Required by law in Texas for most employers.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: A single employee kitchen burn or back injury could cost $20,000+ in medical bills.

recommendedPolicies.name: Flood Insurance
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers water damage from flooding. NOT included in standard commercial property policies.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Standard property insurance explicitly excludes flood damage. Houston averages a major flood event every 2-3 years.

recommendedPolicies.name: Business Interruption
recommendedPolicies.description: Replaces lost income and covers ongoing expenses if your business is forced to close temporarily.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: A 2-week forced closure would cost approximately $3,500 in lost revenue plus $3,500 in ongoing fixed expenses.

recommendedPolicies.name: Equipment Breakdown
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers repair or replacement of essential business equipment due to mechanical or electrical failure.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Commercial ovens, refrigerators, and HVAC systems are expensive to repair. A single compressor failure can cost $3,000-$8,000.

recommendedPolicies.name: Commercial Auto
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers vehicles used for business purposes such as deliveries or catering.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Personal auto policies do not cover accidents during business use.

recommendedPolicies.name: Cyber Liability
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers data breaches and cyber attacks. Important if you process credit card payments.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: POS systems are frequent targets. A data breach can cost $50,000+ for a small business.

recommendedPolicies.name: General Liability
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers third-party bodily injury and property damage.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Customer injuries in-store are the most common small business liability claims.

recommendedPolicies.name: Commercial Property
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers inventory, fixtures, signage, and leasehold improvements.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Inventory loss from fire, theft, or vandalism could wipe out months of investment.

recommendedPolicies.name: Business Owner's Policy (BOP)
recommendedPolicies.description: Bundles general liability and commercial property at a discount.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Most cost-effective bundle for essential coverage.

recommendedPolicies.name: Workers' Compensation
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers employee injuries on the job.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Lifting injuries, slips, and falls are common in retail.

recommendedPolicies.name: Flood Insurance
recommendedPolicies.description: Separate coverage for flood damage.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Flood damage to inventory alone could cost tens of thousands.

recommendedPolicies.name: Business Interruption
recommendedPolicies.description: Replaces lost income during forced closures.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Retail closures during peak season can be devastating.

recommendedPolicies.name: Cyber Liability
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers data breaches from POS systems and online transactions.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Retail POS systems are the #1 target for credit card skimming.

recommendedPolicies.name: General Liability
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers client injuries and property damage.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Chemical burns, allergic reactions, and slip-and-fall claims are common.

recommendedPolicies.name: Professional Liability
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers claims of negligence in professional services.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: A botched treatment or allergic reaction could result in a lawsuit.

recommendedPolicies.name: Commercial Property
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers equipment, furniture, and fixtures.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Salon equipment is expensive to replace.

recommendedPolicies.name: Workers' Compensation
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers employee injuries including repetitive strain.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Stylists face repetitive motion and chemical exposure risks.

recommendedPolicies.name: Business Owner's Policy (BOP)
recommendedPolicies.description: Bundles general liability and commercial property.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Most cost-effective way to get essential salon coverage.

recommendedPolicies.name: Business Interruption
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers lost income during temporary closure.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Salon clients will find a new provider within weeks.

recommendedPolicies.name: General Liability
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers property damage and injuries at job sites.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: A single job site accident can result in claims exceeding $500,000.

recommendedPolicies.name: Workers' Compensation
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers injuries for you and employees on job sites.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Construction has the highest workplace injury rates of any industry.

recommendedPolicies.name: Commercial Auto
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers work trucks and vehicles transporting tools.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Personal auto policies void coverage for business vehicle use.

recommendedPolicies.name: Inland Marine / Tools & Equipment
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers tools and equipment in transit or at job sites.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Tool theft from job sites and vehicles is extremely common.

recommendedPolicies.name: Professional Liability / E&O
recommendedPolicies.description: Covers claims of faulty workmanship or design errors.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: A defect discovered after completion can lead to a massive claim.

recommendedPolicies.name: Surety Bond
recommendedPolicies.description: Guarantees contract completion. Required for many bids.
recommendedPolicies.whyItMatters: Many commercial and government contracts require bonding.
